workshoptitle: How-To: Go From Idea to a LiveLabs Workshop in Minutes

tutorials.title: Introduction
tutorials.description: Overview of the LiveLabs AI Developer Hub, including setup, Codex skills, optional LiveStacks demo generation, and author workflow labs.

tutorials.title: Lab 1: From Idea to Publish-Ready in One Flow
tutorials.description: Turn a source article into a draft LiveLabs workshop with a clear lab plan, validator-aligned markdown, and source-faithful learner tasks.

tutorials.title: Lab 2: Capture Workshop Images in Minutes
tutorials.description: Capture workshop screenshots, annotate key UI states, blur sensitive information, and keep image assets aligned with placeholder references.

tutorials.title: Lab 3: Add Knowledge Checks in Minutes
tutorials.description: Add quiz-based knowledge checks without rewriting the teaching content and validate the result.

tutorials.title: Lab 4: Turn Features into Customer Outcomes
tutorials.description: Create an industry-specific workshop variant, preserve source fidelity, and review the output for drift or duplication.
